# INTENT

## User Request

Remove the excessive left section from the project page because it takes space without adding value, and add an eye icon action on each dashboard project row that opens the public project URL in a new tab.

## Requested Outcome

Make the project editor more focused and make it easier to quickly open the live public page from the dashboard.

## Constraints

- Keep the changes focused to the dashboard/project UI.
- Preserve the current visual language.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
